title: The next phase of the Microsoft OpenAI partnership
description: OpenAI and Microsoft announce an amended agreement that simplifies the partnership, adds long-term clarity, and supports continued AI innovation at scale.

title: Our principles
description: Our mission is to ensure that AGI benefits all of humanity. Sam Altman shares five principles that guide our work.

title: Introducing GPT-5.5
description: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.

title: Plugins and skills
description: Learn how to use Codex plugins and skills to connect tools, access data, and follow repeatable workflows to automate tasks and improve results.

title: What is Codex?
description: Learn how Codex helps you go beyond chat by automating tasks, connecting tools, and producing real outputs like docs and dashboards.

title: Automations
description: Learn how to automate tasks in Codex using schedules and triggers to create reports, summaries, and recurring workflows without manual effort.

title: How to get started with Codex
description: Learn how to get started with Codex by setting up projects, creating threads, and completing your first tasks with step-by-step guidance.

title: Top 10 uses for Codex at work
description: Explore 10 practical Codex use cases to automate tasks, create deliverables, and turn real inputs into outputs across tools, files, and workflows.

title: Codex settings
description: Learn how to configure Codex settings, including personalization, detail level, and permissions, to run tasks smoothly and customize your workflow.

title: Working with Codex
description: Learn how to set up your Codex workspace, create threads and projects, manage files, and start completing tasks with step-by-step guidance.

title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
description: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.

title: Making ChatGPT better for clinicians
description: OpenAI makes ChatGPT for Clinicians free for verified U.S. physicians, nurse practitioners, and pharmacists, supporting clinical care, documentation, and research.

title: Speeding up agentic workflows with WebSockets in the Responses API
description: A deep dive into the Codex agent loop, showing how WebSockets and connection-scoped caching reduced API overhead and improved model latency.

title: Introducing workspace agents in ChatGPT
description: Workspace agents in ChatGPT are Codex-powered agents that automate complex workflows, run in the cloud, and help teams scale work across tools securely.

title: Workspace agents
description: Learn how to build, use, and scale workspace agents in ChatGPT to automate repeatable workflows, connect tools, and streamline team operations.

title: Introducing OpenAI Privacy Filter
description: OpenAI Privacy Filter is an open-weight model for detecting and redacting personally identifiable information (PII) in text with state-of-the-art accuracy

title: Introducing ChatGPT Images 2.0
description: ChatGPT Images 2.0 introduces a state-of-the-art image generation model with improved text rendering, multilingual support, and advanced visual reasoning.

title: Scaling Codex to enterprises worldwide
description: OpenAI launches Codex Labs, partners with with Accenture, PwC, Infosys, and others to help enterprises deploy and scale Codex across the software development lifecycle, and hits 4M Codex WAU.

title: OpenAI helps Hyatt advance AI among colleagues
description: Hyatt deploys ChatGPT Enterprise across its global workforce, using GPT-5.4 and Codex to improve productivity, operations, and guest experiences.

title: Codex for (almost) everything
description: The updated Codex app for macOS and Windows adds computer use, in-app browsing, image generation, memory, and plugins to accelerate developer workflows.
